title: Superpower All-Stars
description: New Superpowers from your favorite shows and games!
body:
![MDF Logo](https://imgur.com/477mzrS.png)



**Each fruit has a tooltip indicating when and how they can be obtained!**

(Or make the recipes yourself)

**Default keybinds are Z, X, C, V and R, altough this can be changed at any moment in the settings menu!**



Ever feel like Minecraft needed powerful and cool looking abilities that also make the gameplay more fun?

Well here you have them!

Embark on a journey to discover the secrets of the 6 new Fruit Items! each with their own moveset, advantages and disadvantages. You can partake in epic battles agaisnt bosses or have PvP duels!

The fruits are so powerful that their attacks/damage get increased as the player levels up in XP!

Keep in mind that these effects lasts 5 hours (or if you eat a different fruit), but remain after death! Also theres a way to craft a fruit which powers last forever:



![Permanent Recipe](https://imgur.com/3mwfqP2.png)

This same recipe can be applied to any fruit to make it permanent!



Dependency:

[Framework](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/framework) is a required library!



Feedback!

In order to keep the mod alive and well, I invite every user that downloads it to leave a comment or send me a message via [Discord](https://discord.gg/3r7NE3Rfwg) @alanorMiga with your thoughts on it!

Any fruit/system/overhaul/moveset idea is totally welcome!

This is the earliest working release of the mod! Be prepared to face bugs and not-polished features. Help on the mod's github is definetly welcome!



Features!
  As of the current release, SPAS has 9 powerful Fruits each with a different moveset!
A total of 30 unique and special abilities in total!
Powers increase in strenght according to the user's XP level!
A way to get permanent effects!
A GUI indicating cooldowns!
That's about it but it's pretty cool!
